mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Community_Post p WHERE p.is_deleted = 0
AND p.category = #{category}
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND p.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR p.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_Like WHERE post_no = #{postNo} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM community_Like WHERE post_no = #{postNo} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE Community_Post SET like_cnt = like_cnt + #{amount} WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
UPDATE Community_Post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, update_date = NOW() WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
mapper.select: SELECT p.post_no AS postNo, p.user_id AS userId, CASE WHEN m.status = 'WITHDRAWN' THEN '탈퇴회원' ELSE IFNULL(d.nickname, p.user_id) END AS nickname, p.title, p.category, p.content, p.view_cnt AS viewCnt, p.like_cnt AS likeCnt, p.reg_date AS regDate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_like WHERE post_no = p.post_no AND user_id = #{userId}) AS isLiked FROM community_Post p LEFT JOIN MEMBER m ON p.user_id = m.user_id LEFT JOIN USER_DETAIL d ON p.user_id = d.user_id WHERE p.post_no = #{postNo}
SELECT user_id FROM Community_Post WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
SELECT p.post_no AS postNo, p.title, p.like_cnt AS likeCnt, p.view_cnt AS viewCnt FROM Community_Post p WHERE p.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY (p.like_cnt * 2 + p.view_cnt) DESC LIMIT 5
